attributes.description: Alerts when `INCREASE(redis.keys.evicted) > 100` in the window. Memory pressure forces key removal.
attributes.name: [Redis OTel] High eviction rate

investigation_guide.blob:
## Redis high eviction rate

### What fired
More than 100 keys evicted during the window.

### Why it matters
Evictions happen when Redis reaches `maxmemory` and enforces its policy. Normal for cache workloads; problematic for data-store workloads (means data loss).

### Triage
1. Check memory trend vs `maxmemory`.
2. Inspect key volume per database.

### Remediation
- Raise `maxmemory` or adopt an eviction policy that matches workload.

### Tuning
- 100 threshold; tune per workload.
